title: tephrosia oblongata
intro: Tephrosia oblongata, also known as the "Fever Bush" or "Yellow Pea Tree", is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia oblongata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-anxiety effects. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia oblongata can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts for use in traditional medicine, although its safety and efficacy for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
